entities.name: SOIL AND WATER CONSERVATION
entities.description: Private investments and measures aimed at conserving soil and water to enhance land productivity

entities.description: Community-based public programmes for the management of water and land resources

entities.name: LAND PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of land, which can be improved through conservation activities

entities.name: ECONOMIC INCENTIVES
entities.description: Financial or economic drivers that motivate small farmers to undertake conservation investments

entities.name: SMALL FARMERS
entities.description: Smallholder agricultural producers who make resource use and investment decisions

entities.name: INDIAN SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The semi-arid tropical region of India where the study was conducted

entities.name: MARKETS
entities.description: Economic systems that influence the investment strategies of farmers

entities.name: INSTITUTIONS
entities.description: Social or organizational structures that influence the investment strategies of farmers

entities.name: EMPIRICAL MODEL
entities.description: A data-driven model used to analyze the determinants of resource use and productivity benefits

entities.name: THEORETICAL FRAMEWORK
entities.description: A conceptual structure developed to guide the empirical analysis of farmer investments
